title: Codiff Configuration
description: Configuration file for Codiff. Supports JSON and JSONC (JSON with Comments).

$schema.description: Path to the JSON schema for editor autocompletion.

agentBackend.description: Which agent CLI powers review assistance and walkthroughs. 'codex' uses the OpenAI Codex CLI; 'claude' uses the Claude Code CLI; 'pi' uses the Pi CLI (reserved for upcoming pi.dev integration).

claudeModel.description: The Claude Code model to use for review assistance and walkthroughs when agentBackend is 'claude'.

codeFontFamily.description: CSS font family name used for diff and code rendering. Leave empty to use Codiff's bundled mono stack.

codeFontSize.description: Font size in pixels used for diff and code rendering.

copyCommentsOnClose.description: Copy pending review comments to clipboard when closing a window.

diffStyle.description: Diff layout style. 'split' shows deleted and added lines side by side; 'unified' shows them in one column.

editorCommand.description: Command used to open files from Codiff. Use {file} as the file path placeholder and {repo} as the repository root placeholder, for example "subl \"{repo}\" \"{file}\"", or leave empty to use Codiff's default editor lookup.

lastRepositoryPath.description: The last repository opened by Codiff when no path was explicitly provided.

openAIModel.description: The OpenAI model to use for review assistance and walkthroughs.

piModel.description: The Pi model to use for review assistance and walkthroughs when agentBackend is 'pi'. Reserved for upcoming pi.dev integration.

showOutdated.description: Show review comments anchored to outdated diff lines. Hidden by default, matching GitHub's review UI.

showWhitespace.description: Show whitespace-only changes in diffs and file line counts.

theme.description: Application color theme. 'system' follows OS preference.

walkthroughPrompt.description: Additional instructions appended to generated walkthrough prompts. Use this to request a language, tone, or level of detail while Codiff keeps its walkthrough guide, hunk ids, review-order constraints, and schema.

wordWrap.description: Wrap long diff lines instead of using horizontal scrolling.

keymap.description: Keyboard shortcut overrides for in-app actions. Use 'Mod' for Cmd on macOS and Ctrl on other platforms.

fileFilter.description: Focus the file filter search input in the sidebar.

nextHunk.description: Jump to the next hunk or review comment. Accepts a single combo or a list of aliases.

prevHunk.description: Jump to the previous hunk or review comment. Accepts a single combo or a list of aliases.

nextSearchMatch.description: Navigate to the next search match.

openFile.description: Open the currently selected file in the configured editor.

prevSearchMatch.description: Navigate to the previous search match.

shortcutsHelp.description: Hold to show the keyboard shortcut overlay.

submitComment.description: Submit a review comment to GitHub or ask Codex.

toggleSidebar.description: Toggle the sidebar between expanded and collapsed states.

toggleWordWrap.description: Toggle word wrap for long diff lines.
